SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="hid2704 kommunemal templsetid9 pagelevel0 page515633 ppt515633 pagelogo frontpage pgn_forside articlelisting hassubmenuitem langno mofebruar AAAA"> <a class="show-for-sr show-on-focus rs_
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content

MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1

MODERATE

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="" class="searchinput" id="someTextBox" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" id="frontpageinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebfcdaname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebfcdaname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="sealle" onclick="sealle();" title="tjenester">Se alle ›</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element

Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="" class="searchinput" id="someTextBox" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebcbcdname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebcbcdname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="" class="searchinput" id="someTextBox" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebaebename' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebaebename" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (213 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Twitter" class="toollink shareonlink twitter" href="#" onclick="return twitThisTwo(document.title, '', location.href, 3);"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-twitter.png" alt="Del
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Tips en venn" class="toollink tipslink tipslinkicon" href="#" onclick="location.href='/fritidsstoette.620908.no.html?showtipform=2#tips'; return false;" title="Tips en venn"> <!-- <img
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Skriv ut" class="toollink printlink printlinkicon" href="#" onclick="window.print(); return false;" rel="nofollow" title="Skriv ut"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-print.png" wi
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="" class="searchinput" id="someTextBox" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebbbacname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebbbacname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="" class="searchinput" id="someTextBox" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

MODERATE

<a class="facebooklink" href="https://www.facebook.com/LundKommune" target="_blank"><img alt="Facebook" src="/cpclass/run/sitefeedback/images/feedback-icon-facebook.png" title="Facebook"/></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.facebook.com/LundKommune" target="_blank"><span class="show-for-sr">Facebook</span><i class="fi-social-facebook"></i></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="" class="searchinput" id="someTextBox" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebbbfaname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebbbfaname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="" class="searchinput" id="someTextBox" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

<a aria-label="Facebook" class="toollink shareonlink facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/share.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.lund.kommune.no%2Faktuelt.623432.no.html" onclick="return fbs_click()" tar
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Twitter" class="toollink shareonlink twitter" href="#" onclick="return twitThisTwo(document.title, '', location.href, 3);"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-twitter.png" alt="Del
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Tips en venn" class="toollink tipslink tipslinkicon" href="#" onclick="location.href='/aktuelt.623432.no.html?showtipform=2#tips'; return false;" title="Tips en venn"> <!-- <img src="/i
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Skriv ut" class="toollink printlink printlinkicon" href="#" onclick="window.print(); return false;" rel="nofollow" title="Skriv ut"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-print.png" wi
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="facebooklink" href="https://www.facebook.com/LundKommune" target="_blank"><img alt="Facebook" src="/cpclass/run/sitefeedback/images/feedback-icon-facebook.png" title="Facebook"/></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.facebook.com/LundKommune" target="_blank"><span class="show-for-sr">Facebook</span><i class="fi-social-facebook"></i></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="" class="searchinput" id="someTextBox" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebeccaname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebeccaname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Start your heading structure with h1

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="" class="searchinput" id="someTextBox" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1

MODERATE

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input autocomplete="" class="searchinput" id="someTextBox" name="find" placeholder="Hva leter du etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebeeffname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebeeffname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
